blocks.content: Send your first metrics to Grafana Cloud by installing an integration. An integration sets up the Grafana Alloy collector and prebuilt dashboards for a host or service, so you can see data in minutes.
You'll need a machine to monitor (this guide uses Linux; macOS and Windows work similarly), terminal and admin access to that machine, and outbound HTTPS on port 443 to `*.grafana.net` allowed.
You'll choose an integration and run its install command on your machine.
Open the main menu and click **Connections**.
Search for your operating system, server, or service, then click its tile. This guide uses the **Linux Server** integration.
On the **Configuration details** tab, copy the install command and run it in your machine's terminal. The command includes a token, so treat it like a secret and don't share it.
Optionally set a **Hostname value** to label this node. Use the **Advanced integration** toggle to send only the metrics the integration needs, which helps control cost.
You've installed an integration. Alloy is now collecting metrics and sending them to Grafana Cloud.
See your metrics on the dashboard the integration installed.
Open the main menu and click **Dashboards**.
Open the integration's folder and dashboard. For the Linux integration, open the **Nodes** dashboard in the **Linux Node** folder.
The dashboard stays empty until the first scrape, then data appears. You can adjust the scrape interval later to balance detail and cost.
You're viewing your first metrics in Grafana Cloud.

Metrics usage scales with what you send. The **Advanced integration** option and the scrape interval are your main cost levers. Refer to [Manage metrics costs](/docs/grafana-cloud/cost-management-and-billing/reduce-costs/metrics-costs/).
Want to explore another path? Reopen **Get started with Grafana Cloud** and choose a different option.

---

### More to explore (optional)

- [Get started with monitoring using an integration](/docs/grafana-cloud/monitor-infrastructure/integrations/get-started/)
- [Integrations reference](/docs/grafana-cloud/monitor-infrastructure/integrations/integration-reference/)
- [Configure Grafana Alloy](/docs/grafana-cloud/send-data/alloy/configure/)
